title: Implement personal data encryption (152-FZ)
description: Encrypt personal data (email, full_name) in the DB using Fernet (cryptography). Add FERNET_KEY to settings and implement transparent encryption/decryption in UserRepository or User model.
acceptance_criteria: Personal data (email, full_name) is stored encrypted in the DB (PostgreSQL)
Data is automatically decrypted when retrieved from the repository/model
FERNET_KEY is required in .env and config.py
Tests pass for data retrieval and storage
